findings.title: compute_session_analytics has zero test coverage
findings.description: backend/routes/backtest.py adds compute_session_analytics(), a 60-line function with multiple distinct branches: daily-interval early return, entry/exit pairing loop, minute-bucket flooring, out-of-session-hours guard, null/non-numeric timestamp guard, wins vs losses classification, and per-bucket win_rate/avg_pnl computation. test_backtest_stats.py was not updated and grep across all backend/tests/ finds zero references to compute_session_analytics, session_analytics, or _SESSION_BUCKETS.
untested_branches: ts is None or not isinstance(ts, (int, float)) -> continue (skip trade)
label not in buckets -> continue (timestamp outside 09:30-16:00, e.g. pre-market or AH trade)
pnl <= 0 path (losses increment; exact zero treated as loss)
odd number of trades (dangling entry silently dropped by while i+1 < len condition)

findings.title: notifications.py module has zero tests
findings.description: backend/notifications.py is a new 126-line module with five public async functions and module-level cached state (_notify_url, _notify_url_checked). No test file exists. Critical untested behaviors: (1) _get_notify_url caches on first call -- setting NOTIFY_URL after first call would see stale None; (2) notify() suppresses all exceptions silently -- no test proves a failing httpx.post does not re-raise; (3) notify() is a no-op when NOTIFY_URL is not set -- no test confirms nothing is dispatched; (4) notify_exit tag logic: moneybag for pnl > 0, money_with_wings for pnl <= 0 -- break-even exit at exactly 0.0 is a non-obvious boundary; (5) notify_exit side label: COVER for short, SELL otherwise.

findings.title: notify() fire-and-forget exception suppression is untested
findings.description: notify() wraps httpx.post in a bare except Exception and logs a warning. No test verifies (a) the warning is actually logged on failure, (b) the function returns None without propagating, or (c) a timeout (5s client config) is handled identically to other exceptions. The production contract never-raises is entirely untested.

findings.title: notify_error dispatch via asyncio.ensure_future in IBKR error handler is untested
findings.description: bot_runner.py wraps notify_error in asyncio.ensure_future() (not await) in the synchronous-style IBKR error callback. If the event loop is not running at that moment the future silently disappears. No test verifies notify_error is called during IBKR error handling. The other notify_error call in the tick recovery path uses await and is also untested. The distinction between ensure_future and await for the same call matters for observability guarantees.

findings.title: StrategyComparison component and getHighlight logic have no frontend tests
findings.description: frontend/src/features/strategy/StrategyComparison.tsx is a new 327-line component. The existing frontend test suite (api-client.test.ts, chart-mount.test.tsx, useOHLCV.test.ts) has no coverage for it. Key untested logic: (1) toggleStrategy enforces a hard cap of 3 strategies -- adding a 4th must be blocked; (2) getHighlight() returns best/worst/null with a tie-breaking rule: if myVal === best && best !== worst -- the case where all strategies tie should return null, not best; (3) runComparison catches errors into error state -- no test verifies the error is surfaced; (4) loadSavedStrategies() silently returns [] on JSON parse failure -- no test verifies this.

findings.title: winRateColor interpolation boundary at exactly 50 is untested
findings.description: Results.tsx adds winRateColor(rate). The branch split is at rate <= 50 vs rate > 50. At exactly rate=50 the two branches produce different RGB values because they use different interpolation formulas. Since 50% win rate is the most common balanced outcome, the exact-boundary color is a real-world case. Additionally the function is not exported, making unit testing require refactoring.

findings.title: session_analytics: pnl exactly 0.0 is silently counted as a loss
findings.description: In compute_session_analytics, the branch if pnl > 0: wins += 1 else: losses += 1 treats break-even trades (pnl == 0.0) as losses. This policy choice is not documented and not tested. A break-even trade inflates losses count and depresses win_rate, which is non-obvious to users reading Session Analytics.

residual_risks.title: Module-level notification state creates test isolation hazard
residual_risks.description: notifications.py uses module-level globals (_notify_url, _notify_url_checked). If tests import this module, the cached value from one test bleeds into subsequent tests unless the module is reloaded or globals are explicitly reset between tests. No test fixtures exist to manage this.

residual_risks.title: Shared httpx.AsyncClient lifetime across server restarts is untested
residual_risks.description: _client is a module-level AsyncClient. If FastAPI lifespan closes the client or httpx closes it after an error, subsequent notify() calls would fail silently. No test covers the degraded-client scenario.

residual_risks.title: StrategyComparison reads localStorage directly -- no test isolation
residual_risks.description: loadSavedStrategies() reads from localStorage. The component is not tested so the empty-strategies branch and the migrateRule() path for legacy indicator names (ema20, ma8 etc.) are untested.

what_to_test: _get_notify_url returns None when NOTIFY_URL not set, returns string when set, caches result
notify() is a no-op when url is None (no HTTP call made)
notify() swallows exceptions and returns None (mock httpx to raise)
notify_entry builds correct title/message/tag for long vs short direction
notify_exit sets tag=moneybag for pnl > 0, money_with_wings for pnl <= 0 including exactly 0
notify_stop sets priority=high and tag=rotating_light
notify_error sets priority=urgent and tag=warning

testing_gaps.gap: No test for compute_session_analytics in test_backtest_stats.py
what_to_test: Returns None for daily/weekly/monthly intervals
Returns list of 13 buckets for intraday intervals
Correctly buckets a trade at 09:45 ET into the 09:30 bucket (minute // 30 == 0)
Correctly buckets a trade at 10:31 ET into the 10:30 bucket
Trade timestamp outside 09:30-16:00 is silently dropped
Odd number of trades (dangling entry) does not crash
None or string timestamp skips the trade pair
Win/loss/win_rate computed correctly for a bucket with mixed trades
Break-even trade (pnl=0.0) counted as loss
toggleStrategy blocks adding a 4th strategy when selected.size >= 3
getHighlight returns null when all strategies tie on a metric (best === worst)
getHighlight returns null when only one result exists
loadSavedStrategies returns [] on JSON parse error
